name: Windows RT
facts: Unlike Windows 8, Windows RT was only available as preloaded software on devices specifically designed for the operating system by original equipment manufacturers (OEMs).

Microsoft launched its own hardware running it, the Surface tablet, which was followed by Surface 2, although only five models running Windows RT were released by third-party OEMs throughout its lifetime.
Windows Mobile smartphones were used to test early builds of WoA because of lack of readily available ARM-based tablets.

name: Windows RT 8.1
facts: Windows RT 8.1 was released in 2013 as a free upgrade, featuring a number of improvements.
